title: Caldera - Data Collection from Local System via findstr and PowerShell (Windows)
description: Detects collection of sensitive documents and data files from local directories. Caldera T1005 emulation searches for and copies high-value files (documents, spreadsheets, databases, source code) from user profiles and common data paths to a staging location. Complements credential_file_discovery with broader document collection.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (( ('Process Name' like '*\\findstr.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*.docx*' or 'Command Line' like '*.xlsx*' or 'Command Line' like '*.pdf*' or 'Command Line' like '*.pst*' or 'Command Line' like '*.kdbx*')) or (('Command Line' like '*Get-ChildItem -Recurse*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-Item -Path*' or 'Command Line' like '*dir /s /b*')) ) and ( (('Command Line' like '*\\Documents\\*' or 'Command Line' like '*\\Desktop\\*' or 'Command Line' like '*\\Downloads\\*' or 'Command Line' like '*\\AppData\\*')) or (('Command Line' like '*C:\\Temp*' or 'Command Line' like '*C:\\Users\\Public*' or 'Command Line' like '*C:\\ProgramData*')) ))
